description: Introduces a three-stage framework governing the allocation of Step 4 Capital to SKY staking rewards, SKY buybacks, and the Surplus Buffer.

diff: Stage 0 is effective until the activation of Stage 1, as specified in [A.2.3.1.4.2.2.1 - Effectiveness](31e35b53-2843-40ec-8e05-40b270104954).
description: Restructures the TMF waterfall across four steps (Security and Maintenance, Aggregate Backstop Capital growth, Smart Burn Engine with split between SKY rewards / USDS rewards / burn, and Staking Rewards). Retires the Net Revenue Ratio and activity-based staking reward tiers.
